chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-4830 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s)  For orders as to non-prosecution 11.03.2026 None present for the petitioner M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh, Additional Advocate General, Sindh and Jan Muhammad Khuhro, AAG alongwith SIP Noor Ahmed, P.S Manghopir, West, Karachi ---------------------- None present for the petitioner. Per office note this petition has been listed for orders as to non-prosecution today, as the counsel for the petitioner has been failed to provide copies. Though the petition in hand is listed by the office for non-prosecution however SIP Noor Ahmed files report as submits that the alleged missing person namely Abdul Rehman had been arrested in different criminal cases including Crime No.73/2025 registered with P.S CTD under sections 23(i)(A) of Sindh Arms Act, 2013 and presently in jail custody, therefore, purpose of this petition has been served; report is taken on record. In view of above, the petition is hereby dismissed having become infructuous alongwith pending application(s), if any. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
